inputs.prompt:
ACTION ONLY
A tiny rented Mumbai room, Iter 3 housing style, cramped but clean. Single bed against the wall, plastic chair, old study table, notebook filled with handwritten ideas, ring light in one corner, clothes hanging behind the door, small ceiling fan spinning slowly.

24-year-old Nisha sits alone in the room recording content on her smartphone. Multiple failed takes. She records a line, stops, deletes, tries again. Frustration visible.

She opens a notebook and writes ideas. Records again. Stops again.

Camera cuts between:

Ring light glowing
Phone mounted on books
Nisha recording
Rewatching her own videos
Looking disappointed
Refreshing her phone repeatedly

No screen visible.

No UI visible.

No dialogue.

Only determination mixed with frustration.

She clearly knows how to create content but doesn't know how to grow it.

Natural realism.

Authentic creator struggle.

Warm tungsten lighting.

Documentary style.

Handheld camera.

FRIEND DIALOGUE
Duration: 3–4 sec
Dialogue

Friend(the girl in green is talking):
"Tu try toh kar rahi hai lekin tareeka nahi aata tujhe. Seekho App khol."

pause

"Wahaan se script likhna seekh."

OMNI PROMPT

College canteen near Mumbai campus.

Busy afternoon.

Students sitting around chatting.

Tea cups, notebooks, backpacks.

Nisha sits across from her female college friend.

Nisha, the girl with the phone appears frustrated and confused.

Friend listens carefully.

Friend leans forward.

Supportive energy.

Not lecturing.

Not judging.

She points toward Nisha's phone.

Natural conversation.

Medium shot.

Over-the-shoulder coverage.

Friend speaks directly to Nisha.

Nisha listens thoughtfully.

The advice lands.

A small realization appears on Nisha's face.

Natural lip sync.

Authentic Indian college environment.

Warm sunlight.

Casual youthful energy.

Human AI realism.

nisha says
" Mujhe banana toh aata hai lekin grow karna bilkul bhi nahi. Ek din ek friend boli....Growth ka raasta waha pe samjhi maine. Writing Viral Instagram Reel Script' — yahaan se script likhna seekha."

nisha says
" Phir comments, phir followers, aisa lag raha tha ki sapna hai. Aaj assi lakh log mere lafz padhte hain. ."

tier 3 tiny rented room.

Same setup.

Same ring light.

Same creator desk.

Now Nisha is more focused.

More confident.

She sits late at night taking notes.

Writing scripts in a notebook.

Practicing lines repeatedly.

Recording reels.

Editing content.

Recording again.

Learning.

Improving.

Fast montage.

No screen visible.

No app UI visible.

Only actions.

GROWTH MOMENT

Nisha uploads a reel.

She waits.

Refreshes.

Waits again.

Suddenly her face changes.

Curiosity.

Then surprise.

Then disbelief.

Then excitement.

INFOGRAPHIC ANIMATION

Premium cinematic floating infographic elements emerge around her.

Not attached to the phone screen.

No visible UI.

No app branding.

Floating around the room.

VIEWS GROW

20K

35K

50K

75K

100K

The numbers rise around her.

Soft glowing particles.

Reflections on her face.

COMMENTS ARRIVE

Hundreds of floating comment bubbles.

Reaction icons.

Discussion indicators.

Reply chains.

Conversation graphics.

No readable comments.

Only visual engagement signals.

FOLLOWERS INCREASE

+2K

+10K

+25K

+50K

+100K

Follower counters rise upward around her.

The room slowly fills with floating success indicators.

NISHA REACTION

She looks around in disbelief.

Smiles.

Laughs softly.

Covers her mouth.

Almost emotional.

Refreshes again.

More growth.

More engagement.

More followers.

The feeling that a dream is becoming real.

FINAL SHOT

Camera slowly circles around Nisha.

The small room remains exactly the same.

Nothing else has changed.

Only the numbers around her have changed.

The audience understands:

Her circumstances stayed small.

Her reach became massive.

End on Nisha smiling at her phone as floating engagement graphics illuminate the room.

Human AI realism.

Netflix commercial quality.

Premium motion graphics.

Photorealistic.

Premium "Asli Kahaani" podcast studio.

Warm amber lighting.

Dark wood interiors.

Soft cinematic bokeh in the background.

Nisha sits opposite the host.

Camera already in a close-up from the previous line.

She has just finished saying:

"Main nahi chhodungi."

A small smile appears on her face as she remembers her mother's stubbornness.

The host smiles subtly.

A brief moment of admiration.

Dialogue

"Lekin sir..."

Nisha leans slightly forward.

The smile becomes more reflective.

Camera slowly pushes closer.

Dialogue

"Maa ab bachon ko silai sikhati hai ghar par."

As she says this, her eyes brighten.

Not emotional.

Proud.

The pride of seeing her mother work by choice rather than necessity.

A small smile remains.

The host nods respectfully.

Camera

Slow cinematic push-in.

Very subtle handheld movement.

Documentary realism.

No cuts.

Single continuous take.

Dialogue

"Aur woh aunty jisne mere se batameezi se baat ki thi..."

The smile fades slightly.

Not from anger.

Only remembrance.

She briefly looks away for a split second.

Then looks back at the host.

Dialogue

"Ab woh meri aankhon mein dekh bhi nahi pati..."

Pause.

Calm delivery.

No revenge.

No satisfaction.

No bitterness.

Just truth.

The host's expression changes.

He understands the significance.

Final Line

"Sharminda hoke."

Nisha says it gently.

Almost sympathetically.

Not as a victory.

Not as payback.

Just as a fact of life.

PERFORMANCE DIRECTION
Nisha

Beginning:

Proud daughter

Middle:

Quiet happiness

Ending:

Graceful dignity

The audience should feel:

She won without trying to win.

Life changed.

She changed.

But her character didn't.

CAMERA DIRECTION
Start in close-up
Slow push-in throughout
Natural eye movement
Minimal gestures
Hold on face after final line
VISUAL STYLE

Photorealistic human AI

Authentic Indian female creator

Premium podcast studio

Warm amber lighting

Netflix interview quality

85mm lens

Shallow depth of field

Natural skin texture

Realistic lip sync

Documentary realism

Cinematic color grading

Subtle facial micro-expressions

Vertical 9:16

END FRAME

After:

"Sharminda hoke."

Silence.

Camera holds for 1 second.

Nisha gives a tiny thoughtful smile.

Host remains quiet.

The statement lands naturally.

SHOT 2 (1.5–4 sec)

Medium close-up on Nisha.

Relaxed smile.

Confident posture.

No hesitation.

Dialogue

"aur woh mujhe bahut paise bhi dete hai."

small nod

"Sir, gareeb hone ka show nahi karna mujhe. Gareebi se निकल ke aana — woh dikhana hai. Yeh fark hota hai."

Delivered naturally.

Not bragging.

Not showing off.

Matter-of-fact confidence.

A calm confident smile.

Host silently nods.

Audience understands her philosophy:

Don't glorify struggle.
Show what's possible beyond it.

she says, looking directly to teh camera with confidence
" Seekho khol. Apne lafzon ko tareeka do. Kyun ki — tumhari mehnat aur हुनर tumse koi nahi cheen sakta.  "
change the guy into a young smart indian guy with glasses, in his 25s, keeping everything lese exactly the same
